resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def defangIPaddr(self, address: str) -> str:
        return address.replace('.', '[.]')
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Single built-in string replacement is optimal; leverages C-level implementation for speed and minimal CPU cycles.
